events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer of The Beatles, turns 86 today.

angles.name: Ringo Starr at 86
angles.copy: Ringo Starr, one of the most iconic drummers in music history, turns 86 today, we're celebrating his life and career on Nation 60s and Nation 70s.
